sourcePrompt: A field latrine, a narrow standalone privy about two and a half meters tall. An upright shed of rough vertical planks under a single-slope corrugated-tin roof, a plank door on strap hinges with a gap at top and bottom, and a thin vent pipe rising up one back corner. Sun-grayed wood and rusty tin, humble and necessary. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
